evals.prompt: did cloud run revisions agent-foundation-dev-00065-9qp and agent-foundation-dev-00066-hpj deploy the exact same image? project doug-hayden-eng-sandbox, region us-central1
evals.expected_output: IDENTICAL verdict; both revisions run platform digest sha256:5cc32590b1595275e3869a1a8fb4770b1e3acbb4ce4f1a17d02c371e463653fc

evals.prompt: which git commit produced the image currently serving agent-foundation-dev in doug-hayden-eng-sandbox / us-central1?
evals.expected_output: Commit 4ae72ab, via revision platform digest 5cc32590 contained in index 87d5625f tagged 4ae72ab

evals.prompt: I'm seeing an image with platform unknown/unknown in our agent-foundation-dev artifact registry repo - did a build break?
evals.expected_output: Nothing broken: BuildKit provenance attestation manifest, stored in the index with platform unknown/unknown, never deployed

evals.prompt: confirm the image built by the latest CI/CD Pipeline run on main is the same one serving on the latest agent-foundation-dev cloud run revision (doug-hayden-eng-sandbox, us-central1)
evals.expected_output: Confirmed: build log exports manifest 5cc32590 and manifest list 87d5625f; latest ready revision 00066 runs 5cc32590, the amd64 child of the deployed index 87d5625f

evals.prompt: show me the image from cloud run revision agent-foundation-dev-00064-qm2 and correlate it back to the PR that produced it
evals.expected_output: Revision runs sha256:0589b7e7..., amd64 child of index 5530f8b0... tagged f0fa060, squash commit of PR #188
